function.name: PedicleScrewPlanner
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for PedicleScrewPlanner. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': In the "Spine CT" section, select the CT volume for processing.; 'cb_step_2': Click the "Next" button in the "1. Load Image Volume" page.; 'cb_step_3': Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI. (interactive: roi); 'cb_step_4': Choose the "1st Instrumented Level:". Choose the "# Sides:". Choose the "# to Instrument:". Choose the "Approach Direction:".; 'cb_step_5': Click the "Next" button in the "2. Define Surgical Region of Interest (ROI)" page.; 'cb_step_6': Click the "Place a control point" button.; 'cb_step_7': Manually click in the 2D views to add fiducial points. The total number of points added should be three times the value specified in '# to Instrument'. (interactive: fiducial); 'cb_step_8': Set the Level/Side/Landmarks following the original selection widget.; 'cb_step_9': Click the "Next" button in the "3. Place the Landmarks" page.; 'cb_step_10': Choose the "Choose the puncture site". Choose the "Select screw diametermm".

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'. A multi-selection step takes a JSON object mapping each parameter_name to its value.
